name: ext-mcp-auth
description: MCP OAuth resource-server helpers: RS enforcement (test_static + introspection_v1 + jwt_jwks_v1), DPoP nonce hardening, signed PRM support (HS256 + asymmetric), trust anchor policy (pinning + rollover), PRM URL/doc pack helpers, and HTTP auth middleware seams.
docs:
MCP OAuth resource-server helpers.

Modules:
- std.mcp.auth.challenge
- std.mcp.auth.dpop_nonce_v1
- std.mcp.auth.http_middleware_v1
- std.mcp.auth.introspection_v1
- std.mcp.auth.oauth_test_static
- std.mcp.auth.prm
- std.mcp.auth.prm_signed_v1
- std.mcp.auth.prm_signed_asym_v1
- std.mcp.auth.prm_signed_verify_v2
- std.mcp.auth.rs_v1
- std.mcp.auth.ssrf_guard_v1
- std.mcp.auth.trust_anchors_v1
